title: Handle signedness and width expansion for class properties and methods

features.name: queue_method_return_signedness
features.description: Code should include a queue with signed integer elements where a built-in method like pop_front() is called, causing the signed return value to be incorrectly treated as unsigned

features.name: class_property_sign_extension
features.description: Code should include a class with a signed shortint property that is used in an arithmetic operation with an unsigned literal, causing incorrect sign extension

features.name: ternary_width_expansion_class_property
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator with a class property on one branch and a wide literal on the other, causing width mismatch that crashes vvp

features.name: context_dependent_signedness
features.description: Code should include an arithmetic operation where unsigned operands cause the entire expression to be treated as unsigned, losing the signedness of the original value
